characters.name: Brandon
characters.description: BrandonGenderMaleSpeciesHumanPersonal InformationFamilyGlowface(uncle)FriendsTuesday X(girlfriend)Production InformationFirst AppearanceThe Spy Who Liked Me Brandonis a recurring character who appears inThe X'sHe is the nephew ofGlowface Brandon was first mention in the episode "The Spy Who Liked Me" when the family discovered that Tuesday had a boyfriend and while Mrs. X was shown to be excited and over emotional Mr. X was furious, even thinking that Brandon could be aS. N. A. F. U.agent who was sent to steal the secrets ofS. U. P. E. R. I. O. R.but Tuesday denied it the idea. He made a full appearance when he arrived at the X's house to pick up Tuesday for their date and after the family embarrass her. As he and Tuesday were about to kiss her bracelet rang and she told him she had to do something and cancelled their date, at the same time Brandon's waistband beeped and he left to. Later at a TV Station as Glowface waited for his JR. Agent to arrive , he appeared on his motorcycle and it was discovered to be Brandon as he also revealed that Glowface is his uncle who forced him to take a summer job as a S.N.A.F.U agent.

characters.name: Glowface
characters.description: GlowfaceYes! The mighty coffee table defeated you before and it shall again!GenderMaleSpeciesHumanHair ColorNonePersonal InformationAffiliationsS.N.A.F.U.OccupationLeader of S.N.A.F.U.SupervillainFamilyBrandon(nephew)FriendsLorenzo SuaveSasquatchThe Scream QueensThe McVampiresMissing LinkBio-HaroldThe Y's(one-sided)EnemiesTucker XTrudy XTuesday XTruman XHome BaseProduction InformationVoiced byChris HardwickFirst AppearanceAAIIEE, Robot!Last AppearanceBreaking Camp Glowfaceis the leader ofS.N.A.F.U.and the primary antagonist ofThe X's.He is voiced byChris Hardwick. Glowface's skin is red and his head is encased in a black glass globe with red electrical discharges. He wears a rubber suit and gloves to contain his vast energies. His schemes to get rid of the X's include having Trudy break her leg on a coffee table, sending them coupons for family portraits, stretching Tucker and Trudy in a torture rack, and cookingTucker,Trudy,Tuesday, andTrumanin a giant waffle iron to make breakfast out of them. Like traditional evil villains, Glowface is megalomaniacal, arrogant, loudmouthed and delusional, but he possesses little sophistication or maturity, and believes himself to be much more of a threat than he actually is. Similar to Dr. Evil, he also tends to think up idiotic evil schemes like building a giant ray gun in order to bring the Eiffel Tower and Big Ben to life in order for them to wrestle so he can sell tickets. He has very poor teeth and once had to get braces. He is disdainful of his nephew Brandon's crush on Tuesday. Glowface is also allergic to zucchini. The only things that Glowface and Tucker have in common are building model train sets and collecting Captain Pepe bobbleheads.

The only things that Glowface and Tucker have in common are building model train sets and collecting Captain Pepe bobbleheads.

characters.name: Home Base
characters.description: Home BaseGender(male voice)SpeciesComputer/House/RobotPersonal InformationAffiliationsSUPERIORAliasesHomer BassingtonH.B.FriendsThe X'sEnemiesGlowfaceS.N.A.F.UProduction InformationFirst AppearanceAAIIEE, Robot!Last AppearanceBreaking Camp Home Baseis self-described as "the house the X's live in". In addition, he is the A.I. that can control every electrical item in the house, whose presence is symbolized by a variety of screens that show a flashing red light whenever he speaks. He often serves as the (somewhat beleaguered) voice of reason in the family and has an English accent. He is voiced byStephen Root. Home Base appears to be just an ordinary suburban house. But beneath its banal facade is the cutting edge in super secret headquarters. Home Base has been designed to provide for all the needs of the modern secret- agent family. Designed and equipped bySUPERIOR, home base is truly the world’s most intelligent home. Home Base is the super-efficient servant who’s been stuck with a group of losers. The only person Home Base really respects and gets along with isTuesday. HB has a calm, gender-neutral speaking voice. It can talk to the family anywhere they are in the house, and often does. “Mrs. X, your cafe au lait is ready.” “Truman, you dropped graham crackers and then stepped on them on my living room carpet.” The X's have a love/hate relationship with their house. Often they find it a bossy know-it-all. When they’re feeling that way, they slam a lot of doors (“Please don’t slam my doors.”). Home Base can be a pain because it’s a stickler for secret agent protocol. If you don’t know the password of the day, you won’t get in the front door.Mr. Xcan never remember the day’s password. “Is it .... cuttlefish?” “That was this morning’s password. Sorry. It changed while you were out.”Trumanhas been known play a prank or two on Home Base, like the time he painted “Kick Me” on the side of the house. Although our family of X's has a mother and father, they sometimes act like four children. When they do, Home Base acts as their parent, chiding them and making sure they do what they’re supposed to do.

characters.name: Kimla Meeks
characters.description: Kimla MeeksGenderFemaleAge16SpeciesHumanHair ColorOrangePersonal InformationFriendsTuesday X(best friend)Truman X(love interest)Production InformationVoiced byAshley JohnsonFirst Appearance"License to Slumber"Last Appearance"Theater of War" Kimla Meeksis a recurring character inThe X's. She is Tuesday X's best friend. She is voiced byAshley Johnson. Kimla is a huge fan of science fiction and is also very knowledgeable about sci-fi movies, comics, etc. She also seems to be somewhat naive as she doesn't notice Truman's crush on her or that the X's are spies despite being presented with proof. Kimla is a huge fan of science fiction and is also very knowledgeable about sci-fi movies, comics, etc. She also seems to be somewhat naive as she doesn't notice Truman's crush on her or that the X's are spies despite being presented with proof.

characters.name: Lorenzo Suave
characters.description: Lorenzo SuaveGenderMaleSpeciesHumanHair ColorOrangePersonal InformationAffiliationsS.N.A.F.U.FriendsGlowfaceSasquatchThe Scream QueensThe McVampiresMissing LinkBio-HaroldProduction InformationVoiced byTom KaneFirst AppearanceAAIIEE, Robot!Last AppearanceBreaking Camp Lorenzo Suaveis Glowface's "right-hand man" and butler. He was voiced byTom Kane. Lorenzo seems to be an amalgam of all the villainous second-in-command spy cliches: he is stylishly and impeccably dressed with short, orange hair with bangs in the shape of devil horns as well as a mustache, goatee, a scar along one cheek and both an eyepatch and a monocle. Lorenzo is much more intelligent than Glowface in terms of common sense, and sometimes has to maneuver him into completing his plans when Glowface begins one of his rants; though Lorenzo is human, he is most likely S.N.A.F.U.'s mirror toHome Base. He becomes upset when Glowface claims, after he took off his horrid disguise and introduced himself, that no one cares. However, inYou Only Sneeze Twice, when Glowface as well as the other S.N.A.F.U. agents were sick, he proved to be a better villain than Glowface or any of the others members, as the X's have always seen Lorenzo as the strong one (despite saying inPinheadsthat he "always loathed physical activity") and has fighting skills near-identical toTuesday X's which was shown when Tuesday was facing him solo due to the other X's being too sick to fight.

characters.name: Louise
characters.description: LouiseGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanHair ColorLight redEye ColorGreenPersonal InformationOccupationPolice OfficerFamilyStanley(husband)Trudy X(daughter)Tucker X(son-in-law)Tuesday X(granddaughter)Truman X(grandson)EnemiesGlowfaceProduction InformationFirst AppearanceIn-Law Enforcement Louiseis the wife ofStanley, the mother ofTrudy X, the mother-in-law ofTucker Xand the maternal grandmother ofTuesday XandTruman X. She and her husband appear inIn-Law Enforcementwhen they come to visit the X’s. She and Stanley are both police officers and she doesn’t know that her daughter and her family are spies. Like her husband, she doesn’t like her son-in-law very much, but loves her grandchildren and sees them as their future police officers.

characters.name: Seven Y
characters.description: Seven YGenderFemaleAge16SpeciesHumanHair ColorBlackEye ColorBlackPersonal InformationAffiliationsSUPERIOROccupationSpyFamilySanjay Y(father)Sapriya Y(mother)Scout Y(sister)Production InformationVoiced bySoleil Moon FryeFirst AppearanceY's UpLast AppearanceTheater of War Seven Yis a minor antagonist inThe X's. She isTuesday X's Y counterpart. Seven has long and straight black hair, dark blue glasses, and burgundy lipstick. Seven’s outfit consists of turquoise studded earrings, a dark gray sweater vest, a gray shirt with a red necktie, a dark blue plaid miniskirt, over the knee socks and dark turquoise high heeled boots. Seven believed that she and her family are a better spy family then The X's, threatening when they refuse to quitSUPERIORso they can be the top spy family. Seven is also shown to be a great actress as in her first appearance she and her family pretending to be nice to the X's when their neighbors came to their home. Then she pretended not to notice the robot spy Tuesday sent when saw all the awards for her acting skills as she plans to win the part of Juliet in order to steal Brandon from Tuesday.

characters.description: StanleyGenderMaleSpeciesHumanHair ColorBrownEye ColorBrownPersonal InformationOccupationPolice OfficerFamilyLouise(wife)Trudy X(daughter)Tucker X(son-in-law)Tuesday X(granddaughter)Truman X(grandson)EnemiesGlowfaceProduction InformationFirst AppearanceIn-Law Enforcement Stanleyis the husband ofLouise, the father ofTrudy X, the father-in-law ofTucker X, and the maternal grandfather ofTuesday XandTruman X. He and his wife only appear in the episodeIn-Law Enforcementwhen they visit the X's. He and his wife are both police officers and he doesn't know that his daughter, son-in-law, and grandchildren are spies. Like his wife, he loves his grandchildren and sees them as their future police officers, yet doesn't like his son-in-law very much and he makes him the attacker so he can teach his grandchildren how to fight.

characters.name: SUPERIOR
characters.description: SUPERIORis a secret agency dedicated to protecting the world against evil. in particular the world’s most evil secret organizationS.N.A.F.U. SUPERIOR finds itself locked in a never-ending battle with the nefarious forces of S.N.A.F.U. good news is that SUPERIOR, though it has never completely defeated S.N.A.F.U, is holding it at bay quite nicely. We don’t know a lot about SUPERIOR, and that’s just the way SUPERIOR likes it. Both SUPERIOR and S.N.A.F.U. want to remain secret. that's the one thing they agree on.

characters.name: The Scream Queens
characters.description: The Scream QueensGenderFemaleAge16Hair ColorOrangeEye ColorOrangePersonal InformationAffiliationsS.N.A.F.U.OccupationS.N.A.F.U. agentsFriendsGlowfaceLorenzo SuaveSasquatchEnemiesTucker XTrudy XTuesday XTruman XProduction InformationFirst AppearancePhoto Ops The Scream Queensare a duo ofBanshee-esqe cheerleaders with a sonic boom screech.

characters.name: The Z's
characters.description: The Z'swere a spy family who worked forSUPERIORthat supposedly died in an accident. However, theY'shinted that they themselves caused the deaths of the Z's, presumably because they were SUPERIOR's number one spy family (like how the Y's eventually tried to have the X's killed so they could be SUPERIOR's main operatives instead). The Z's were revealed to have been Juggalos and huge fans of the band called "Insane Clown Posse" in the episode "Secret Agent Manual".

characters.name: Timmy Turner
characters.description: Timmy Turner is a main character from another Nicktoon calledThe Fairly OddParents!. Timmy Turner has two Fairy GodParents named Cosmo and Wanda. Cosmo and Wanda are also the main characters from The Fairly OddParents.

characters.name: Timmy Turner
characters.description: Timmy Turner is a main character from another Nicktoon calledThe Fairly OddParents!. Timmy Turner has two Fairy GodParents named Cosmo and Wanda. Cosmo and Wanda are also the main characters from The Fairly OddParents.

characters.name: Truborg
characters.description: TruBorgis a cyborg sent toHome BasebyGlowfaceto stall the X's after he capturedTrumanto convince him to joinS.N.A.F.U.The Truborg spent days doing all sorts of nice things for Tucker, Trudy, and Tuesday, even mowing the lawn, but when they started to realize that this was really a cyborg, Homebase turned on the water sprinklers to spray the decoy Truman, blowing it up and making it official to the X's that this was not the real Truman.TruBorgGenderMale programmingSpeciesCyborgPersonal InformationAffiliationsSNAFUFriendsTucker XTrudy XTuesday XProduction InformationFirst AppearanceTruman X: Super Villain Trudy XTuesday X

characters.name: Truborg

characters.name: Trudy X
characters.description: Trudy XGenderFemaleAge38SpeciesHumanHair ColorOrangeEye ColorGreenPersonal InformationAffiliationsSUPERIOROccupationSpyFamilyTucker X(husband)Tuesday X(daughter)Truman X(son)Stanley(father)Louise(mother)FriendsHome BaseEnemiesGlowfaceLorenzo SuaveSasquatchThe Scream QueensRobo-MomThe Y'sProduction InformationVoiced byWendie MalickFirst AppearanceAAIIEE, Robot!Last AppearanceBreaking Camp The Y's Trudy X, better known asMrs. X, is one of the main characters. Trudy is the second in command/combat specialist and mother of the X family. Trudy is fully trained in hand-to-hand combat and martial arts and is a professional tennis player, but she’s a repulsive cook. Trudy is a loving mother, that seems to be less clueless than her husband. She takes missions very seriously. She also might suffer from anger issues, as she is known for administering savage beatings to Glowface (sometimes twice).  She is also quite bloodthirsty and gets very excited at the thought of viciously beating up villains, particularly Glowface. She's a collector of plush toys and a huge fan of the villainCopperhead. She says that she’s the only person with the complete line of Copperhead plush.

characters.name: Truman X
characters.description: Truman XGenderMaleAge10SpeciesHumanHair ColorOrangeEye ColorGreenPersonal InformationAffiliationsSUPERIOROccupationSpyFamilyTucker X(father)Trudy X(mother)Tuesday X(sister)Stanley(maternal grandfather)Louise(maternal grandmother)PetsRex X(dog)FriendsHome BaseKimla Meeks(love interest)EnemiesGlowfaceLorenzo SuaveSasquatchThe Scream QueensThe Y'sCopperheadDogsLove InterestsKimla MeeksProduction InformationVoiced byJansen PanettiereFirst AppearanceAAIIEE, Robot!Last AppearanceBreaking Camp Truman Xis one of the four main characters ofThe X's. He is the technology expert and son of the X family. Truman is the youngest and smartest of all the X's. His radiation "experiments" cause so many "meltdowns" that the local decontamination Squad are on a first name basis with the "X"s. The infant terrible of the "X"s; Sometimes he can be a nuisance and cause trouble. He was voiced by the lateJansen Panettiere. Truman is a science genius and he has an obsession with gadgets. He can range from being relatively harmless to very cruel/destructive, depending on his mood. He was also frequently a delinquent, getting into all sorts of trouble. Though, he’s very loyal to his family, Truman exceptionally mischievous behavior. This causes him to somewhat be a loose cannon at times. Despite being the most intelligent of his family and his universe, Truman still has the same thought process as the average child his age would have. This makes him easily manipulated at times, as well as not solving issues that have easy solutions. Truman is a science genius and he has an obsession with gadgets. He can range from being relatively harmless to very cruel/destructive, depending on his mood. He was also frequently a delinquent, getting into all sorts of trouble. Though, he’s very loyal to his family, Truman exceptionally mischievous behavior. This causes him to somewhat be a loose cannon at times. Despite being the most intelligent of his family and his universe, Truman still has the same thought process as the average child his age would have. This makes him easily manipulated at times, as well as not solving issues that have easy solutions. Truman has buck teeth, freckles, and thick, orange hair that matches Trudy's. He wears a green or brown shirt with a lighter-colored horizontal stripe around the middle, black pointed-toe shoes, white socks, and shorts that come in various colors. He’s 10 years old.
